concierge_guardrails: Deterministic local resolver; no external AI key required
Only answers from source-backed Ciao Baby audit/scrape/review evidence
Refuses reservations, table holds, current availability, fake ordering, prices/specials, allergy/medical advice, and private-event contract claims
Unsupported/current-state requests hand off to phone and directions

mission_control_remote_sync.blocker: AGENCY_AUTONOMY_API_KEY and OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET are unset in this runtime, so this payload is local-only until official Mission Control API auth is available. No raw Supabase write was used.

heartbeat_summary: Completed Ciao Baby concierge gate locally with deterministic truth-safe KB, /api/concierge route, contact-page UI, smoke-test transcript, build/typecheck, and browser evidence. Local stage advanced to pitch; remote MC sync remains pending auth.
